AND(CreatedBy.ManagerId <> CC_FCA_Finance__c && CreatedBy.ManagerId <> CC_FCA_Finance__r.ManagerId && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted'), (OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'FCA Sr Professional - USA') && !(ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Operations Manager')) &&(CC_CNAUpdate__c==true || CC_CNAUpdate__c==false)&& ( CC_Junior_Operations_Manager__c = true|| CC_Junior_Operations_Manager__c = false) && ((ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')) && (!ISBLANK(NAFTA_RecallAmount__c) && CC_CheckAmount__c> NAFTA_RecallAmount__c && CC_CheckAmount__c > 10000))||((!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')) || (ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))) && (ISBLANK(NAFTA_RecallAmount__c) && CC_CheckAmount__c>10000))),
(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'FCA RO / Manager (USA)') && !(ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Operations Manager')) &&(CC_CNAUpdate__c==true || CC_CNAUpdate__c==false)&& ( CC_Junior_Operations_Manager__c = true|| CC_Junior_Operations_Manager__c = false) && ((ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')) && (!ISBLANK(NAFTA_RecallAmount__c) && CC_CheckAmount__c> NAFTA_RecallAmount__c && CC_CheckAmount__c > 25000))||((!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')) || (ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))) && (ISBLANK(NAFTA_RecallAmount__c) && CC_CheckAmount__c>25000))), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Top Care Agent - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c > 5000),

(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Area Manager')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>2500&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false),
(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Area Manager')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>0&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true),
(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'CRM')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>5000) )))

AND(CreatedBy.ManagerId <> CC_FCA_Finance__c && CreatedBy.ManagerId <> CC_FCA_Finance__r.ManagerId && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted'), (OR( (OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist')) && !(ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Operations Manager')) && (!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')) || (ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))) && (( CC_CNAUpdate__c==false && CC_Junior_Operations_Manager__c = true && ((ISBLANK(NAFTA_RecallAmount__c) && CC_CheckAmount__c > 1500)||(!ISBLANK(NAFTA_RecallAmount__c) && CC_CheckAmount__c > NAFTA_RecallAmount__c)) )|| ((CC_CNAUpdate__c==true || CC_CNAUpdate__c==false) && CC_Junior_Operations_Manager__c = false && ((ISBLANK(NAFTA_RecallAmount__c) && CC_CheckAmount__c > 2500)||(!ISBLANK(NAFTA_RecallAmount__c) && CC_CheckAmount__c > 2500)))|| (CC_CNAUpdate__c==true && ((ISBLANK(NAFTA_RecallAmount__c) && CC_CheckAmount__c > 0)||(!ISBLANK(NAFTA_RecallAmount__c) && CC_CheckAmount__c > 0))))),

)))

(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Operation Head - USA') && !(ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Operations Manager'))&&(CC_CNAUpdate__c==true || CC_CNAUpdate__c==false) && ( CC_Junior_Operations_Manager__c = true|| CC_Junior_Operations_Manager__c = false) && ((!(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')) || (ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))) && (ISBLANK(NAFTA_RecallAmount__c) && CC_CheckAmount__c > 5000)|| ((ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall')) && (!ISBLANK(NAFTA_RecallAmount__c) && CC_CheckAmount__c > 5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c > NAFTA_RecallAmount__c)))) )))

(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Special Investigation team' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Level3 Agent'))&& ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted')&& CC_CheckAmount__c > 10000) )))

AND(!(ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Operations Manager')),(OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Supervisor') && CC_Junior_Operations_Manager__c = true && ((!(ISBLANK(NAFTA_RecallAmount__c))&&(CC_CheckAmount__c>NAFTA_RecallAmount__c)&&(CC_CheckAmount__c>25000))||((ISBLANK(NAFTA_RecallAmount__c))&&CC_CheckAmount__c>25000))&&(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Supervisor') && CC_Junior_Operations_Manager__c = true && !(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))&& ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c >25000),
